data.body: Document Knots concurrency requirements for SQLite lock contention: queue and serialize write operations, allow immediate reads under WAL snapshot isolation, keep WAL enabled, keep/set busy timeout, add bounded write retries with jitter for SQLITE_BUSY/SQLITE_LOCKED, keep write transactions short, and define read-after-write behavior for commands requiring strict freshness.
data.title: Document SQLite concurrency strategy for lock contention
